text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days before the Takarazuka Kinen, Sakura
Chiyono O makes some final adjustments for the
race with the help of Maruzensky, the
Umamusume she idolizes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O explains that it was thanks to
her rivals that she's been able to make her return
to racing. Hearing this, Maruzensky beams and
wishes her every success at the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Takarazuka Kinen arrives. As
Mejiro Ardan, Yaeno Muteki, and Sakura
Chiyono O celebrate their reunion, they're
approached by Inari One, a racer whose recent
feats have been remarkable indeed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One throws down the gauntlet for the three
of them, and Mejiro Ardan senses from this new
foe's formidable aura that there's more to her
than bluster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, not a single one of the three racers
feels intimidated by Inari One. In fact, as they
prepare to race, they're elated by the prospect of
facing such a strong opponent.
